public-data-only.label: Public Data Only
public-data-only.description: Record is based on public data only and does not include high-fidelity biometric cloning.

restricted-runtime.label: Restricted Runtime
restricted-runtime.description: Runtime access is private or limited.

cross-border-blocked.label: Cross-border Blocked
cross-border-blocked.description: No cross-border copy or inference is allowed.

memorial-review-required.label: Memorial Review Required
memorial-review-required.description: Memorial or estate-authorized record requiring additional review.
